summary: Built the strategic argument for Careerspan as a story-based assessment layer that captures authentic behavioral signals (self-awareness, communication quality, follow-through) through pro-candidate AI coaching—data that traditional aptitude tests and keyword matching cannot provide. Mapped to specific acquirer types: ATS platforms seeking differentiation (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby) and assessment companies needing qualitative capability (Criteria, HireVue, PI).
key_insight: The pro-candidate framing is Careerspan's secret weapon—candidates reveal authentically to a coach helping them succeed, while they perform/game for assessments evaluating them. This flips the data quality equation and produces behavioral signal no traditional assessment can capture.
